metadata.description: Uniswap V3 AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents integrating the Uniswap V3 protocol.

skills.name: uniswap-integration
skills.description: Direct Uniswap V3 protocol integration for reading on-chain data and executing swaps

skills.name: uniswap-planner
skills.description: Position planning and strategy generation for Uniswap V3 swaps and liquidity

skills.name: uniswap-risk-assessor
skills.description: Risk analysis including slippage, price impact, and impermanent loss for Uniswap positions

skills.name: uniswap-security-foundations
skills.description: Security guidance and audit checklists for Uniswap V3 integrations

skills.name: uniswap-viem-integration
skills.description: EVM blockchain integration using viem for Uniswap V3 operations
